Schedule a TourContact Us

The Daphne

The Daphne offers a refined two-story design that blends comfort and functionality. The open-concept main floor features a spacious kitchen with an oversized island, flowing into the dining area and great room, with seamless access to a covered rear patio and welcoming front entry. The private first-floor primary suite includes a spa-inspired bath and walk-in closet with direct access to the laundry room. Upstairs, three additional bedrooms surround a versatile loft, with a convenient Jack-and-Jill bath and separate hall bath. Thoughtfully designed with elevated details and everyday livability, The Daphne is built for modern, comfortable living.

Available Exteriors

Select your home's architectural style

1 of 4
Natural Scheme
Mediterranean Cape Dutch
2,100
sq ft
A blend of timeless character with modern sophistication. Sculptural gables, smooth stucco exteriors, and clay tile roofs create a refined presence, while black-framed windows and graceful archways introduce a clean, contemporary edge. The result is an elevated streetscape that feels both classic and distinctly current.
No items found.
Natural Scheme
Mediterranean Estate
2,100
sq ft
A pairing of timeless elegance with a clean, modern sensibility. Smooth stucco exteriors, clay tile roofs, and expansive windows create a light-filled, refined presence, while graceful arches and tailored detailing add depth and character. The result is an elevated design that feels both enduring and distinctly contemporary.
Natural Scheme
Mediterranean Turret
1,743-4,935
sq ft
Defined by sculptural forms, warm tile roofs, and smooth stucco exteriors that create a timeless yet distinctive presence. A signature turret element adds architectural drama, while graceful arches, columned entries, and layered rooflines bring depth and elegance. Thoughtfully balanced with expansive windows and refined detailing, the style feels both stately and welcoming, designed for elevated, modern living.
